name: Ichiban Dashi ( Basic Soup Stock)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 4 pints of cold water into a large saucepan and bring it to boil.
2. Drop in the kombu, and bring just to boil again.
3. Remove the kombu and set aside.
4. Stir in the katsuobushi and turn off heat.
5. Let rest for 2 minutes, then skim off scum.
6. Strain out the katsuobushi.
7. Set both aside. The stock may be used immediately or can be used up to 8 hours later. It can be kept in the fridge for up to 2 days.
